commands.review_summary:
The PR adds cooperative yielding and abort-aware error classification to Ollama native stream processing, plus dense NDJSON regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +86. Total +133 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Partly. The scoped dense NDJSON starvation mechanism is source-reproducible from current main and the added regression test shape, but I did not reproduce the full Windows Gateway starvation report live.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer label plus provider-streaming availability risk require human merge judgment rather than an automated repair.

target.title: fix(ollama): yield during dense stream processing
target.body:
## Summary

- add cooperative yielding while Ollama native streams process dense NDJSON bursts
- preserve caller abort handling during those yields so aborted runs surface as aborted instead of generic stream errors
- add focused coverage that proves timers can fire before dense stream completion

Fixes part of #86599.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/outbound-core-send-after-rebase-$USER-$$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.core-send.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` provider=aws lease=cbx_f3391752a7d8 slug=swift-hermit run=run_6f3b42d8e7a2 base=a52c4d101af32fa5f4600ef0cac5b1fcecb0c6be exit=0
